input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.1.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have a fully operational suspension system with shock absorbers, front and

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.1.1: The vehicle must have a fully operational suspension system with shock absorbers, front and
V.3.1.1 The vehicle must have a fully operational suspension system with shock absorbers, front and 
rear, with usable minimum wheel travel of 50 mm, with a driver seated.

final_answer: The vehicle must have a fully operational suspension system with shock absorbers, front and rear, with usable minimum wheel travel of 50 mm, with a driver seated.
